---
title: EMDB
alias: &ALIAS emdb
href: https://www.ebi.ac.uk/emdb/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

The Electron Microscopy Data Bank (EMDB, EMBL-EBI) is a public repository for electron microscopy density maps of macromolecules and subcellular structures determined by cryo-EM and related methods.

## Key Features

- Archives cryo-EM density maps and associated fitted atomic models from published studies
- Standardized metadata including resolution, symmetry, sample preparation, and imaging conditions
- Integrates with PDBe for linked 3D structure and density map visualization
- Supports validation reports assessing map quality and model-to-map fit
- Provides programmatic access via EMDB REST API and bulk download

## Use Cases in Research

- Accessing cryo-EM density maps of pathogen ribosomes, membrane proteins, and drug targets
- Training AI models for automated particle picking, map classification, and structure refinement
- Comparing drug-bound and apo structures of AMR-relevant protein targets
- Using density maps for structure-based antibiotic design and binding mode analysis
- Benchmarking cryo-EM data processing pipelines against deposited reference datasets

## Getting Started

Visit [EMDB](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/emdb/) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
